use_cases: Landing page hero sections requiring atmospheric visual depth
Product showcase backgrounds with subtle ambient motion
Brand presentation areas needing modern decorative elements
SaaS dashboard headers or empty state backgrounds
Event or portfolio websites seeking contemporary visual effects
ai_summary: A decorative animated background component featuring three colorful blur blobs with continuous random motion, rotation, and translation effects. Creates a modern glassmorphism aesthetic with smooth ambient animation using CSS transforms and performance-optimized requestAnimationFrame. Designed to provide visual depth and atmosphere for landing pages, hero sections, and product showcases without distracting from foreground content.
